name: Coriander Sausage Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all the ingredients for the filling.
2. Prepare the casing by placing it in a bowl of warm water to relax.
3. Fit the open end of the casing over the faucet and allow warm water to run through it.
4. Slide the fitted casing over the sausage nozzle on the grinder.
5. Place the filling into the top of the grinder and crank the machine, allowing the filling to feed into the casing.
6. Continue cranking until the entire casing is filled.
7. Tie knots in the sausage every 4 inches using butchers twine.
8. Cook as desired.
